title: CreditCoachingPlan
description: Due-date & utilization coaching this module OWNS and PROVIDES (FR-CRD-002): a recommend-only plan that advises a SPECIFIC early-payment amount (integer cents) and optional spend re-routing to bring per-card or aggregate utilization into the healthy band (< 30%, or the optimal band < 10% when the user's goal is credit-boosting) BEFORE a statement date. Recommend-only — FinOS never moves money; each action is surfaced for explicit per-action user execution (Constitution IV, FR-X-003). Every plan carries Reasoning (inputs + bilingual rationale) and a FreshnessStamp. Money inputs (balances, limits, recommended payment) are integer cents; utilization figures are decimal-string fractions read from finos:spine/CreditState/1.0.0. When a primary MONEY input (balance, credit limit) or the CreditState utilization is STALE the plan is WITHHELD (status='withheld'); the documented-default exception does NOT apply (utilization here is the OUTPUT being acted on, and the payment amount is a money figure). Consumers: Credit UI, Cash Safety, Pay, Bills, Household.

profile_id.description: Owning profile. AuthZ enforced server-side against the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id (threat model IDOR).

status.description: active = an actionable plan is available; withheld = a primary money input or CreditState utilization was stale/missing, so no figure is asserted (ask the user to refresh); satisfied = utilization already in the target band, no action needed.

withheld_reason.description: Populated only when status='withheld'. Names the missing/stale primary input so the UI can show the Withheld Card with a targeted CTA (e.g. 'Refresh balance'). NEVER guess a money input.

target_band.description: healthy (< 30%) is the default coaching target; optimal (< 10%) is targeted only when the user's stated goal is credit-boosting (FR-CRD-002).

actions.description: Ordered recommend-only actions. Empty when status='withheld' or 'satisfied'.

action_type.description: pay_early = pay a specific amount before the statement date; reroute_spend = move planned spend to another card to avoid pushing utilization up; request_limit_increase_consideration = informational note that a higher limit would lower utilization (never an application). All recommend-only.

account_id.description: The spine account_id (from AccountState) this action targets.

recommended_payment.description: For action_type='pay_early': the SPECIFIC amount (integer cents) that brings this card below the target band, computed in arbitrary precision and rounded half-up once at the cent. Absent for non-payment actions. This is a MONEY figure — never emitted on a stale/withheld input.

utilization_before.description: Per-card utilization before the action, decimal-string fraction from CreditState (normally [0,1]; may exceed 1.0 only for genuinely over-limit cards).

utilization_after.description: Projected per-card utilization after the action, decimal-string fraction. For pay_early this is below the target band.

statement_due_on.description: The statement date this action must precede to affect the reported utilization.

time_to_goal_contribution.description: Optional bilingual-rendered (at the edge) time-to-goal context per FR-X-004, e.g. days saved toward a credit-boosting goal; null when no goal is associated.

label_fr.description: Plain-language action title, French (fr-CA). Missing fr label is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

safe_to_act_deferred.description: true iff Cash Safety's SafeToActSignal indicated an early-payment would create an overdraft risk; Cash Safety takes precedence and the conflict + resolution are surfaced (umbrella cross-module edge case; precedence per ux-foundations §3.1/§10.4).

reasoning.description: Inputs (balances, limits, utilization_before/after, statement date) + bilingual rationale that produced the plan (Constitution VI, FR-X-006). Recorded in full only in the append-only audit trail; redacted from debug logs.

freshness.description: Freshness of the most-stale input the plan was computed from (oldest input governs). Stale ⇒ status='withheld' (Constitution VIII).
